2026-0183
2026-03-03PMODepartment of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development ActAppointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs and his designation as Deputy Minister for International TradeAppointment of Glenn Purves of New York City, United States of America, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs, to hold office during pleasure; and his designation as Deputy Minister for International Trade, to be styled Deputy Minister of International Trade, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Foreign Affairs, Trade and Development Act
subject: Appointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs and his designation as Deputy Minister for International Trade
precis: Appointment of Glenn Purves of New York City, United States of America, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs, to hold office during pleasure; and his designation as Deputy Minister for International Trade, to be styled Deputy Minister of International Trade, effective March 23, 2026.
